rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VIRGINIA LEA WOODARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear (For Administrator Roy Woodard)
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MEI FUNG CHEW
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/21/25. Examiner's Notes sent with the following issues: 1) The petition repeatedly refers to Petitioner as the executor; however, there was no will admitted to probate. 2) Petitioner alleges that Decedent was survived by two children; however, Pinkeung Chow also survived Decedent (post-deceased). Please allege why the proposed distribution does not include distribution to his estate, whether a personal representative has been appointed for his estate (and if not, who the successors in interest are), and whether a waiver of accounting needs to be filed by his personal representative (or successors in interest). 3) Please allege whether any federal or state income taxes are due or payable by the estate. 4) The interested parties listed in Exhibit A of the petition have not all been given notice. It appears that the Notice of Hearing filed on 3/26/25 is missing an attachment. 5) A revised proposed order should be filed if any changes need to be made.
